metadata.name: Customer Support Triage
metadata.description: Classify, prioritize, and draft responses to customer support tickets using plugins and agent profiles.

knowledge_base.description: Access internal knowledge base for support articles.

classifier.description: Fast classification agent for ticket categorization.

prompt.system: You classify support tickets. Return category, severity, and sentiment.
prompt.user:
Classify this support ticket:

{{ inputs.ticket }}

Return:
- Category: bug, feature_request, billing, account, or other
- Severity: low, medium, high, critical
- Sentiment: positive, neutral, negative, angry
- Summary: one sentence

prompt.system: You search for relevant support articles.
You are a helpful, empathetic support agent. Language: {{ inputs.language }}. Be warm, professional, and solution-oriented.

search_kb.reason: Knowledge base search is optional; response can be drafted without it
